---
title: "Code"
listing:
  contents: .
  fields: [image, date, title, reading-time, description]
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
comments: false
---

### R packages

-   [`narrSVAR`](https://github.com/aaron-lohmann/narrSVAR) R package to estimate SVAR models with sign restrictions and importantly narrtive sign restrictions as discussed in AR18.
